message:
docs: add rustdoc to 8 undocumented pub types in storage/ingest/search

StorageHandle, CapturedSegmentKind, EmbedError, EmbedderTier,
EmbedderInfo, Embedder trait, HashEmbedder, RerankError — all
re-exported public API surface that lacked doc comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
